extension.description: Otomatis ubah ke Google DNS setiap Kodi start - Tanpa pengaturan, langsung jalan! Support IPv4 + IPv6. Khusus untuk Android (Firestick, Android Box, Shield TV).
extension.news: v1.0.0 (2025-01-21) - Initial release - Auto-change DNS saat Kodi start - Support IPv4 (8.8.8.8) + IPv6 (2001:4860:4860::8888) - Tanpa root, tanpa pengaturan
